allow: PowerShell(cd "C:\\Users\\Admin\\Desktop\\updive nsm\\updive-back"; $r = docker compose exec app curl -s "http://localhost/api/v0/devices/172.16.208.80/ports"; $r.Substring\(0, [Math]::Min\(800, $r.Length\)\))

PowerShell(cd "C:\\Users\\Admin\\Desktop\\updive nsm\\updive-back"; $r = docker compose exec app curl -s "http://localhost/api/v0/devices/172.16.208.80/ports"; \($r -join ""\) | Select-Object -First 1 | ForEach-Object { $_.Substring\(0, [Math]::Min\(600, $_.Length\)\) })

PowerShell(cd "C:\\Users\\Admin\\Desktop\\updive nsm\\updive-back"; $r = docker compose exec app curl -s "http://localhost/api/v0/ports?deviceid=1"; \($r -join ""\) | ForEach-Object { $_.Substring\(0, [Math]::Min\(800, $_.Length\)\) })

PowerShell(cd "C:\\Users\\Admin\\Desktop\\updive nsm\\updive-back"; $r = docker compose exec app curl -s "http://localhost/api/v0/devices/172.16.208.80/ports?columns=port_id,ifName,ifOperStatus,ifSpeed,ifInOctets_rate,ifOutOctets_rate"; \($r -join ""\) | ForEach-Object { $_.Substring\(0, [Math]::Min\(500, $_.Length\)\) })
